title: tephrosia woodii
intro: Tephrosia woodii, also known as Wood's tephrosia or Wild cowhage, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia woodii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tephrosia woodii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
